forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the north, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Becoming cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
